text: Steel structures of railway Bridges from second half of XIX century are the subject of this paper. The motivation for the research was an article published in quarterly “Roads and Bridges - Drogi i Mosty" No. 2 (2014). The aim of this paper is to identify structural possibilities of Bridges and discuss their load bearing capacity. It was concluded that for verification of load carrying capacity of bridges exploited for a long time, the long term effects on the material properties should be taken into account.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
